ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester when the course is offered */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* Subject code for the course */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date when the exam for the course is scheduled */,
  "session" TEXT /* Session of the exam (e.g., A.N., F.N.) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits associated with the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course (e.g., a list of course IDs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name and contact information of the department head */,
  "department_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exams" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam session */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course being examined */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date when the exam takes place */,
  "session" TEXT /* Session of the exam (e.g., A.N., F.N.) */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number where the exam is held */,
  "exam_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the exam in minutes */,
  "exam_type" TEXT /* Type of exam (e.g., written, practical, oral) */,
  "exam_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or instructions for the exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the student belongs to */,
  "student_type" TEXT /* Type of student (e.g., undergraduate, graduate, PhD) */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's academic advisor */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's program or major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student enrolled */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, inactive, withdrawn) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade earned by the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exam session */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student attending the exam */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of the student's attendance (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "attendance_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the student's attendance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_attendance_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade obtained by the student */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date when the grade was assigned */,
  "grade_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student receiving the notification */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., exam schedule change, grade posting) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the room */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the room is located */,
  "room_capacity_type" TEXT /* Type of capacity (e.g., seating, standing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room allocation */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exam session */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the room allocated */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the room was allocated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_allocations_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_allocations_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "special_accommodations" (
  "accommodation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each special accommodation */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student receiving the accommodation */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exam session */,
  "accommodation_details" TEXT /* Details of the accommodation provided */,
  "accommodation_date" TEXT /* Date when the accommodation was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accommodation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_special_accommodations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_special_accommodations_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)
